set.caption: Table 27.9 The integration points and weights for a number of n-point Gauss–Laguerre and Gauss–Hermite integration formulae. Where the points are given as $\pm x _ { i } ,$ the contributions from both $+ x _ { i }$ and $- x _ { i }$ must be included. However, the contribution from any point $x _ { i } = 0$ must be counted only once.

overrides.reason: 正文 body[304] 明確引用 Table 27.9；實際供應端是 body[309] 的 table shard，其 footnote 已含完整 'Table 27.9 ...' caption，但目前只有 fallback id tbl-ch27-309 並被標 unnumbered_body_table。把此塊語意化後即可覆蓋唯一殘留 C5。
